parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/150.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.query:
WITH input_data AS (
    SELECT
        $1::text AS code,
        $2::text AS source_name,
        $3::text AS source_url,
        $4::boolean AS ok
),
upsert_source AS (
    INSERT INTO public.gift_code_sources (
        name,
        url,
        is_active,
        last_fetched_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        source_name,
        source_url,
        TRUE,
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM input_data
    WHERE ok = TRUE
    ON CONFLICT (url)
    DO UPDATE SET
        name = EXCLUDED.name,
        is_active = TRUE,
        last_fetched_at = NOW(),
        updated_at = NOW()
    RETURNING id
),
upsert_code AS (
    INSERT INTO public.gift_codes (
        code,
        source_id,
        status,
        first_seen_at,
        last_seen_at,
        created_at,
        updated_at
    )
    SELECT
        input_data.code,
        upsert_source.id,
        'active',
        NOW(),
        NOW(),
        NOW(),
        NOW()
    FROM input_data
    CROSS JOIN upsert_source
    WHERE input_data.ok = TRUE
      AND NULLIF(BTRIM(input_data.code), '') IS NOT NULL
    ON CONFLICT (code)
    DO UPDATE SET
        source_id = EXCLUDED.source_id,
        status = CASE
            WHEN gift_codes.status = 'disabled' THEN gift_codes.status
            ELSE 'active'
        END,
        last_seen_at = NOW(),
        updated_at = NOW()
    RETURNING id, code, status, source_id, first_seen_at, last_seen_at
)
SELECT
    id AS gift_code_id,
    code,
    status,
    source_id,
    first_seen_at,
    last_seen_at
FROM upsert_code;

INSERT INTO public.gift_code_redemptions (
    gift_code_id,
    game_account_id,
    status,
    queued_at,
    created_at,
    updated_at
)
SELECT
    $1::uuid,
    ga.id,
    'pending',
    NOW(),
    NOW(),
    NOW()
FROM public.game_accounts ga
WHERE ga.is_active = TRUE
ON CONFLICT (gift_code_id, game_account_id)
DO NOTHING
RETURNING
    id AS redemption_id,
    gift_code_id,
    game_account_id,
    status,
    queued_at;

INSERT INTO gift_code_redemptions (
    gift_code_id,
    game_account_id,
    status,
    response_message,
    processed_at
)
SELECT
    gc.id,
    ga.id,
    'already_redeemed',
    'Marked as previously used before automation',
    NOW()
FROM gift_codes gc
JOIN game_accounts ga
    ON ga.player_id = '247069619'
WHERE gc.code IN (
    'HAPPYEMOJIDAY',
    'Kingshot888',
    'VIP777'
)
ON CONFLICT (gift_code_id, game_account_id)
DO UPDATE SET
    status = 'already_redeemed',
    response_message = 'Marked as previously used before automation',
    processed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO gift_code_redemptions (
    gift_code_id,
    game_account_id,
    status
)
SELECT
    gc.id,
    ga.id,
    'pending'
FROM gift_codes gc
CROSS JOIN game_accounts ga
WHERE gc.status = 'active'
  AND ga.is_active = TRUE
  AND (
      gc.expires_at IS NULL
      OR gc.expires_at > NOW()
  )
  AND NOT EXISTS (
      SELECT 1
      FROM gift_code_redemptions r
      WHERE r.gift_code_id = gc.id
        AND r.game_account_id = ga.id
  )
RETURNING
    id,
    gift_code_id,
    game_account_id,
    status,
    queued_at;

SELECT
    r.id AS redemption_id,
    gc.code,
    ga.player_id,
    ga.nickname,
    ga.server_id,
    r.status,
    r.attempt_count,
    r.response_message,
    r.queued_at,
    r.processed_at
FROM gift_code_redemptions r
JOIN gift_codes gc
    ON gc.id = r.gift_code_id
JOIN game_accounts ga
    ON ga.id = r.game_account_id
WHERE ga.player_id = '247069619'
ORDER BY
    CASE r.status
        WHEN 'pending' THEN 1
        WHEN 'processing' THEN 2
        WHEN 'success' THEN 3
        WHEN 'already_redeemed' THEN 4
        ELSE 5
    END,
    r.queued_at DESC;
